experiment_question: Can the P62 document-indexing recipe produce useful quality, protocol, and economics evidence on a bounded TSA23 data-package slice within a strict paid-supervisor budget?

checkpoint_spans.description: Pilot slice selection, budget validation, and preflight.
Build bounded worker tickets from tracked manifests and ignored runtime chunks.
Launch and monitor the local worker execution within the declared attempt limit.
Summarize worker outputs into public-safe aggregate evidence.
Audit selected candidate facts against source evidence and classify accepted, repaired, rejected, or escalated records.
Update tracked summaries, roadmap, changelog, and issue state.

stop_condition.description: Stop after one live attempt, when the budget is exceeded, or when a protocol defect requires reticketing or scope expansion.

maintainer_checkpoint.trigger: before any second live attempt, repair expansion, broader page span, added model family, or budget increase
maintainer_checkpoint.decision_surface: tracked sanitized P63 pilot summary with quality/protocol/economics outcomes and line-item paid-supervisor cost
